import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None
def test_find_in_sorted_upper_half_mid_bug():
    """Reveals the bug: binsearch(mid, end) instead of binsearch(mid+1, end).
    When target > all elements, the lower bound never advances past 'mid',
    causing infinite recursion (RecursionError)."""
    import source
    # Target larger than every element forces upper-half recursion.
    # Buggy code: infinite recursion -> RecursionError (test failure).
    # Fixed code: returns -1 (not found).
    result = source.find_in_sorted([3, 4, 5, 6, 7], 8)
    assert result == -1
